title: Snake and other antivenom stocks replenishing as production resumes
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Positive strides...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Positive strides are being made in addressing South Africa’s snake antivenom shortage.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Positive strides are being made in addressing South Africa’s snake antivenom shortage."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The National Health Laboratory Service ( NHLS) announced this week that antivenom production had resumed and that the first batch, comprising over 500 units, had been released."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Antivenom stocks have been critically low since at least mid-2024, with the South African Vaccine Producers (SAVP) confirming in October that it was unable to supply doses.","html":"Antivenom stocks have been critically low since at least mid-2024, with the South African Vaccine Producers (SAVP) confirming in October that it was unable to supply doses."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Roughly 4 000 snakebites annually"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The NHLS resumed production in early September and has produced 435 units of polyvalent antivenom — meaning it can be used against multiple toxins.","html":"The NHLS resumed production in early September and has produced 435 units of polyvalent antivenom — meaning it can be used against multiple toxins."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Additional batches are in production, but manufacturing antivenom is not a simple process.","html":"Additional batches are in production, but manufacturing antivenom is not a simple process."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The production of antivenom is a complex and time-intensive process that requires extensive in-process inspections to ensure the safety, quality and effectiveness of every vial produced,” stated the NHLS.","html":"“The production of antivenom is a complex and time-intensive process that requires extensive in-process inspections to ensure the safety, quality and effectiveness of every vial produced,” stated the NHLS."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The African Snakebite Institute (ASI) states that South Africa records roughly 4 000 snake bites a year, resulting in 900 hospitalisations.","html":"The African Snakebite Institute (ASI) states that South Africa records roughly 4 000 snake bites a year, resulting in 900 hospitalisations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Only 3% of snakebite victims require treatment with antivenom; however, not receiving it could result in death.","html":"Only 3% of snakebite victims require treatment with antivenom; however, not receiving it could result in death."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The reason for the antivenom was reportedly due to electricity supply issues and renovations at the SAVP.","html":"The reason for the antivenom was reportedly due to electricity supply issues and renovations at the SAVP."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Spider, scorpions and boomslang"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Antivenom that will be produced by the NHLS will include polyvalent antivenom, boomslang antivenom, spider antivenom and scorpion antivenom.","html":"Antivenom that will be produced by the NHLS will include polyvalent antivenom, boomslang antivenom, spider antivenom and scorpion antivenom."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ASI stated that Southern Africa has more than 2 200 spider species, but that there has never been a fatal spider bite in the region.","html":"ASI stated that Southern Africa has more than 2 200 spider species, but that there has never been a fatal spider bite in the region."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Scorpion species number roughly 150 and are also “not potentially life-threatening”, while fewer than six boomslang bites are recorded annually, according to ASI.","html":"Scorpion species number roughly 150 and are also “not potentially life-threatening”, while fewer than six boomslang bites are recorded annually, according to ASI."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These antivenoms are due for release in November this year.","html":"These antivenoms are due for release in November this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The organisation believes this is a crucial step in restoring the local supply of lifesaving antivenom, which is essential for treating snake, spider and scorpion envenomation,” the NHLS concluded.","html":"“The organisation believes this is a crucial step in restoring the local supply of lifesaving antivenom, which is essential for treating snake, spider and scorpion envenomation,” the NHLS concluded."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Article: Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Snake and other antivenom stocks replenishing as production resumes
